criteria.notes: ADS components (Page, PageHeader, Table, Badge, Field, etc.) are imported and used but render largely unstyled in the screenshot—no table borders, no colored badges, broken logo icons.
compact.theme.css with --ams-* tokens is imported and Amsterdam Sans font loads, but component-level token styling (colors, borders, spacing) is not visually apparent.
compact.css imported and HTML has class="amsterdam-theme compact" but compact mode effect is indistinguishable since overall component styling is degraded.
PageHeader and PageFooter components are used with correct layout positions, but logo shows broken ✖ characters, footer has no dark spotlight background, and menu links run together.
NewPermit.tsx uses ADS Field/Label/ErrorMessage/FieldSet composition throughout all 4 steps, but form page is not shown in screenshot and dashboard styling issues suggest similar degradation.
ADS Table component with Table.Header/Body/Row/Cell is used, but screenshot shows no borders, no row styling, and column text running together.
No banned libraries—dependencies are only ADS packages, React, react-dom, and react-router-dom.
4-step wizard with ProgressList step indicator exists in NewPermit.tsx code but is not visible in the screenshot to verify visual correctness.
Per-field validation with inline ErrorMessage components exists in code for each step, but form page is not shown in the screenshot.
InvalidFormAlert component with error links is used in code, but not visible in the screenshot to confirm rendering.
All input types present in code (TextInput, Select, Radio, DateInput, Checkbox, TextArea), but form is not shown in the screenshot.
Step 4 renders a read-only summary using DescriptionList component, but not visible in the screenshot.
All visible text is in Dutch: headings, labels, column headers, status values, footer links, and navigation items.
Text uses clear B1-level Dutch with active voice, e.g. 'Overzicht van alle ingediende vergunningaanvragen'—no jargon or complex sentence structures.
Status labels (Ingediend, In behandeling, Goedgekeurd, Afgewezen) and error messages in code are all properly in Dutch.
React Router BrowserRouter with three routes (/, /nieuw, /zaak/:id) configured in App.tsx; Dashboard loads at /.
tsconfig.app.json has strict: true enabled, and all source files use TypeScript (.tsx/.ts) with proper type definitions.
